_meta.notes: Blood Altar multiblock structures per tier. Each tier lists every block (offset x,y,z from the altar at 0,0,0) that must be present. isBloodRune = any blood rune accepted in that slot; isUpgradeSlot = a rune slot the player customises (capacity/speed/sacrifice runes). Tiers are cumulative (a tier-4 altar also satisfies lower tiers).

tiers.note: Tier 1 = the Blood Altar alone (no surrounding structure).
